click.prompt: short crisp UI button click, soft wooden tap, single percussive snap, dry, no reverb, mobile-game friendly
click.label: UI button click

hover.prompt: very short bright UI hover blip, glassy chime, soft single high tone, no reverb, subtle, friendly, mobile-game friendly
hover.label: UI hover blip

earn.prompt: short coin pickup chime, two warm bell tones rising in pitch, satisfying reward feedback, no reverb tail, mobile-game friendly
earn.label: Resource earned

harvest.prompt: satisfying resource harvest chime, sparkling cascade of coins and crystals, three quick rising bell tones with a soft glittering shimmer on top, joyful pickup feedback, dry, no reverb tail, mobile-strategy game friendly
harvest.label: Harvest collect

upgrade.prompt: magical building upgrade chime, ascending warm sparkle, soft bells with a gentle shimmer rising, fantasy strategy game
upgrade.label: Building upgrade complete

victory.prompt: triumphant short victory fanfare, three rising horn notes, warm orchestral brass, heroic, joyful, ends cleanly, no long tail
victory.label: Victory stinger

defeat.prompt: soft sad descending defeat motif, low cello with a gentle muted brass, melancholy but not harsh, ends cleanly
defeat.label: Defeat stinger

deploy.prompt: insect swarm deploying from a tunnel, brief whoosh with a subtle chitinous flutter, organic and energetic, no reverb
deploy.label: Unit deploy

dig.prompt: ant digging into earth, short dirt scrape with crumbling soil, organic, gritty, low frequency emphasis, no reverb
dig.label: Tunnel dig

ambush.prompt: tense ambush sting, low ominous swell with a sudden whisper of insect chitter, brief, mysterious, mobile-game friendly
ambush.label: Ambush trigger

split.prompt: swarm splitting into two paths, two-note pheromone chime, light and airy, suggestive of branching, no reverb
split.label: Path split

modifierTick.prompt: tiny UI tick blip, dry single soft click, very short, neutral pitch, no reverb
modifierTick.label: Modifier tick

buildingHit.prompt: wooden building takes a hit, short impact thud with a small crack, dry, organic, no metallic ring
buildingHit.label: Building hit

buildingDestroyed.prompt: small wooden bug-hive structure collapsing, splintering crack followed by a brief earthy crumble, satisfying mid-frequency punch, no long reverb
buildingDestroyed.label: Building destroyed

queenDestroyed.prompt: epic boss-defeat moment, deep sustained earth tremor with a regal horn fall and crystalline shatter, dramatic and final, fades cleanly
queenDestroyed.label: Queen destroyed

unitDeath.prompt: small insect unit defeated, short squelchy chitin pop with a tiny descending whimper, organic, not gory
unitDeath.label: Unit death

music-home.prompt: warm cozy mobile-strategy home base ambient loop, gentle marimba and soft pads with a slow bouncy bass, friendly Supercell-style cartoon hive theme, mid-tempo, no harsh percussion, suitable for seamless looping under UI
music-home.label: Home base music

music-raid.prompt: tense fast-paced strategy raid combat loop, driving low strings, light tribal percussion, urgent but not aggressive, perfect for an attacking-the-enemy-base scene, mobile-game friendly, suitable for seamless looping
music-raid.label: Raid combat music

music-arena.prompt: energetic spectator arena loop, bouncy synth bass with playful brass stabs and tribal drums, suspenseful but fun crowd energy, mobile-game friendly, suitable for seamless looping
music-arena.label: Arena spectate music

music-clan.prompt: social clan-hall lounge ambient loop, warm acoustic guitar and soft pads with gentle hand percussion, conversational, friendly, low energy, mobile-game friendly, suitable for seamless looping
music-clan.label: Clan hall music

music-landing.prompt: epic cinematic mobile-game main menu theme loop, sweeping orchestra with hand-painted fantasy fanfare, warm horns, hopeful adventurous mood, hero-game vibes, suitable for seamless looping under marketing video
music-landing.label: Landing page music
